aetherdendro.name: Q-Explosion
aetherdendro.note: Q/A1/C6 have a 8m/12m (Hydro) detection area with the same hitbox position.

aetherdendro.name: Q-Tick
aetherdendro.note: At every tick: Spawn 1 attack on a random enemy in the detection area.

aetherelectro.name: Q-FallingThunder
aetherelectro.note: Spawns on target hit during Q.

aethergeo.name: Q-Shockwave
aethergeo.note: C1 has a detection area of 7m around the position of this hitbox.

aetherhydro.name: Q
aetherhydro.note: Starts at Traveler position + 0.5m in that direction and moves at 1.5m (or 1.05m if Traveler C2+) per attack.

albedo.name: E-Skill
albedo.note: E/C4/C6 has a detection area of 10m around the position of this hitbox.

albedo.name: E-TransientBlossom
albedo.note: Spawns on target that the E proc'd on.

albedo.name: Q-FatalBlossom
albedo.note: Each blossom targets a separate enemy within the E detection area if possible, otherwise it randomly spawns in the E detection area.

aloy.name: E-ChillwaterBomblets
aloy.note: Attacks spawn at same Target as E-FreezeBomb.

amber.name: Q-ArrowRainLoop
amber.note: Burst center is at PrimaryTarget. 5 arrows spawn at a random position with radius distance from burst center, 3 arrows spawn at a random position with radius distance from burst center, 10 arrows spawn at a random position between 0.1m and radius distance from burst center.

baizhu.name: E
baizhu.note: Is done as a chain of attacks starting at PrimaryTarget and moving on to a random enemy within 10m radius of the current enemy (including current enemy) if such an enemy exists.

baizhu.name: C2
baizhu.note: Spawns on target that C2 proc'd on.

barbara.name: E-MelodyLoop-1.5s-Timer
barbara.note: Melody Loop mechanics (collision) are not properly implemented yet.

beidou.name: Q-Initial
beidou.note: C6 has an detection area of 5m around Player.

beidou.name: Q-Lightning
beidou.note: Is done as a chain of attacks starting at the target hit and moving on to a different, random enemy if such an enemy exists.

beidou.name: Q-C4
beidou.note: Spawns on target that C4 proc'd on.

bennett.name: Q-ElementalBurst
bennett.note: Q has a detection area with the same hitbox.

charlotte.name: C6
charlotte.note: Spawns on target that the C6 proc'd on. Heal is 5m instead of 3m.

chasca.name: E-Aimed
chasca.note: Target aquisition range is not implemented.

chasca.name: C4
chasca.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE. Based on C2 position.

chevreuse.name: E-Surging-Blade
chevreuse.note: Spawns on the first enemy hit by E.

chevreuse.name: Q-Explosive-Shell
chevreuse.note: There are 8 shells which split the 6m radius around the Q hit pos into 8 equal parts. Each shell attack extends to the edge of the radius.

chevreuse.name: C2
chevreuse.note: Spawns at X: -1.5/1.5m offset from the target that the C2 proc'd on.

chiori.name: Q
chiori.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE.

chiori.name: A1-Tapestry
chiori.note: Spawns on target that A1 Tapestry proc'd on.

chongyun.name: E-Skill
chongyun.note: E has a detection area of 8m around the position of this hitbox.

chongyun.name: E-A4
chongyun.note: Spawns at the closest enemy to the E detection area center or at that center if no such enemy exists.

collei.name: Q-Initial
collei.note: A4 has a detection area of 6m around the position of this hitbox.

collei.name: Q-C6
collei.note: Spawns on target that C6 proc'd on.

dehya.name: E-Indomitable
dehya.note: E has a detection area of 10m around the position of this hitbox.

dehya.name: E-Field
dehya.note: Spawns on target that the E proc'd on.

diluc.name: Q-DoT
diluc.note: This is a moving hitbox. It moves at 2.8m in Y direction per attack and starts at Y: 1m (pay attention to the offsetY!).

diluc.name: Q-Explosion
diluc.note: This is part of a moving hitbox. This hitbox spawns at Y: 1 + 14*1.7 = 24.8m (pay attention to the offsetY!).

diona.name: Q-Initial
diona.note: Q/C4/C6 has a detection area of 7m around the position of this hitbox.

dori.name: Q-SelfHit
dori.note: Q spawns at offsetY 5 and has a detection area of 10m. This attack is only triggered if the Player is within the Q detection area.

dori.name: Q-Connector
dori.note: Q spawns at offsetY 5 and has a detection area of 10m. This attack is a line going from the Player to the Q position if the Player is within the Q detection area.

emilie.name: Q-Level3
emilie.note: At every tick: If there are enemies within the Q detection area that are not currently marked, then it spawns at a random enemy out of those. This random enemy is then marked for 0.7s. Otherwise, it will spawn randomly between 0.5m and 12m from the Q center.

faruzan.name: E-Collapse
faruzan.note: Spawns on target that Pressurized Collapse proc'd on.

faruzan.name: Q-Initial
faruzan.note: Q detection area for Prayerful Wind's Benefit (Anemo%) is 40m, for Perfidious Wind's Bale (Anemo res shred) it is 6m around the current Q position. Q moves around in a triangle with its center being the same as Q-Initial between 3 positions: top right (offsetX: 5.19, offsetY: 10.5), top left (offsetX: -5.19, offsetY: 10.5), bottom middle (offsetY: 1.5). Starting from top right it moves counterclockwise.

fischl.name: E-A4
fischl.note: Spawns on target that A4 proc'd on.

furina.name: E-Surintendante-Chevalmarin
furina.note: Target aquisition range is not implemented.

furina.name: E-Gentilhomme-Usher
furina.note: Target aquisition range is not implemented.

furina.name: E-Mademoiselle-Crabaletta
furina.note: Target aquisition range is not implemented.

ganyu.name: Q-Start
ganyu.note: Q/A4/C4 has a detection area of 10m around the position of this hitbox. This hitbox is a 0 damage attack that is not implemented yet.

ganyu.name: Q-IceShard
ganyu.note: At every tick: If there are enemies within the Q detection area that are not currently marked, then it spawns at a random enemy out of those. This random enemy is then marked for 1.45s. Otherwise, it will spawn randomly between 0.5m and 9.5m from the Q center.

gorou.name: E
gorou.note: E has a detection area of 8m around the position of this hitbox.

gorou.name: Q-CrystalCollapse
gorou.note: Spawns on enemy within 8m of Player.

jean.name: Q-ElementalBurst
jean.note: Q/C4 detection area is the same as this hitbox.

jean.name: Q-InOut
jean.note: Enter/exit mechanics are not properly implemented yet.

kaedeharakazuha.name: Q-Initial
kaedeharakazuha.note: AbsorbCheck has the same hitbox except that it is 8m radius.

kamisatoayaka.name: CA-1
kamisatoayaka.note: There are up to 5 possible instances of CA-1, CA-2, CA-3. It looks for an anchor enemy in 5m radius around player. If such an enemy exists, then it looks for additional enemies in 4m radius around the anchor enemy. If less than 5 enemies were targeted, then it checks for gadgets to target.

kamisatoayato.name: E-WaterIllusion
kamisatoayato.note: Spawns at the position Player was at when E was used.

kamisatoayato.name: Q-BloomwaterBlade
kamisatoayato.note: Q has a detection area of 10m around the position of Player when Q was used. At every tick: If there are enemies within the Q detection area that are not currently marked, then it spawns at a random enemy out of those. This random enemy is then marked for 1.45s. Otherwise, it will spawn randomly between 1.5m and 9.5m from the Q center.

kaveh.name: C6
kaveh.note: Spawns on target that C6 proc'd on.

kinich.name: Q-Laser
kinich.note: In actual game Ajaw's laser is single target: hit is spawned on the enemy the laser touched. To approximate laser's AoE, we use box.

kirara.name: E-Hold
kirara.note: Rolling mechanics (collision) are not properly implemented yet.

kirara.name: Q-Mine
kirara.note: Mine mechanics are not properly implemented yet.

kirara.name: C4
kirara.note: Spawns on target that C4 proc'd on.

klee.name: E-Mine
klee.note: Mine mechanics are not properly implemented yet.

klee.name: Q
klee.note: At every tick: Spawn 3 waves with 3-5 attacks total: 1. 1 attack; 2. 1 attack + 30% chance at +1; 3. 1 attack + 50% chance at +1.

kujousara.name: E-Skill
kujousara.note: Attack buff detection area has the same hitbox.

kujousara.name: Q-Titanbreaker
kujousara.note: Attack buff detection area has the same hitbox.

kujousara.name: Q-Stormcluster
kujousara.note: Every Stormcluster has its own direction (0/90/180/270 degrees at base, 0/60/120/180/240/300 degrees at C4+), starts at Q-Titanbreaker position + 3.6m in that direction and moves at 1.35m per attack. Attack buff detection area has the same hitbox.

layla.name: E-ShootingStar
layla.note: At every tick: Look for the closest enemy within 10m radius of Player. If no enemy was found, then check again in 0.1s. Otherwise, spawn the attack in 0.5s.

layla.name: Q
layla.note: At every tick: Look for the closest enemy within 12m radius of Player with offsetY: 1. If an enemy was found, spawn the attack at their position.

lisa.name: E-Hold
lisa.note: Spawns on all enemies within 10m radius of Player.

lisa.name: Q-Discharge
lisa.note: At every tick: Below C4: spawn 1 attack at a random enemy in the burst area (7m radius around Player). At C4+: Select up to 3 entities (enemy > gadget). 1 entity: spawn 1 attack at that entity. 2 entities: 16% / 60% (first tick only) chance to spawn 2 attacks, 1 attack otherwise. 3 entities: 50% chance to spawn 2 attacks, 1 otherwise if first tick or 3 attacks were spawned in the previous tick. Otherwise 25%/50%/25% split between 1/2/3 attacks.

luminedendro.name: Q-Explosion
luminedendro.note: Q/A1/C6 have a 8m/12m (Hydro) detection area with the same hitbox position.

luminedendro.name: Q-Tick
luminedendro.note: At every tick: Spawn 1 attack on a random enemy in the detection area.

lumineelectro.name: Q-FallingThunder
lumineelectro.note: Spawns on target hit during Q.

luminegeo.name: Q-Shockwave
luminegeo.note: C1 has a detection area of 7m around the position of this hitbox.

luminehydro.name: Q
luminehydro.note: Starts at Traveler position + 0.5m in that direction and moves at 1.5m (or 1.05m if Traveler C2+) per attack.

lynette.name: E-Hold
lynette.note: Spawns at the closest enemy in 8m radius around the player.

lynette.name: E-Aligned
lynette.note: Spawns on the first enemy hit by E.

lynette.name: Q-Initial
lynette.note: Q spawns at Y: 1.8m offset from the player position.

lynette.name: Q-Bogglecat
lynette.note: Spawns on the Q position. Absorbs an element either by getting hit or the absorb check with 0.48m radius around the Q position that happens every 0.3s.

lynette.name: Q-VividShot
lynette.note: Spawns on a random enemy within 15m radius of the Q position.

lyney.name: FullAim-Lv2-Aligned
lyney.note: Spawns at the target hit by FullAim-Lv2.

lyney.name: FullAim-Lv2-PyrotechnicStrike-Skill
lyney.note: Spawns at the position of the Grin-Malkin Hat which is at the FullAim-Lv2-Aligned position.

lyney.name: Q-Move
lyney.note: On every tick: Applies to all enemies within 4m radius of the Player.

mavuika.name: CA-Flamestrider-Cyclic
mavuika.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE. This is a moving hitbox. It moves at varying speeds in a circle of radius 4.0m around the player with a hitbox radius of 3.0m.

mavuika.name: C6-Flamestrider
mavuika.note: Spawns on target that C6 proc'd on.

mika.name: E-Shard
mika.note: Spawns up to 3 attacks on 3 random enemies within 10m radius of Player that were not hit by E-Flare.

mona.name: E-DoT
mona.note: Spawns at phantom position which was spawned on Player.

mona.name: E-Explosion
mona.note: Spawns at phantom position which was spawned on Player.

mona.name: Q-Bubble
mona.note: 0 damage attack that breaks bubble if not already broken has the same hitbox.

mona.name: Q-Bubble-Explosion
mona.note: Spawns on the target that the Bubble burst on.

mona.name: A1
mona.note: Spawns at phantom position which was spawned on Player.

mona.name: CA-C2
mona.note: Spawns on target that C2 proc'd on.

nahida.name: C6-TKP
nahida.note: Spawns on target that C6 proc'd on.

navia.name: E-Ceremonial-Crystalshot
navia.note: If any bullet hits a target, then this attack will spawn on them.

navia.name: Q-Fire-Support
navia.note: The Circle Spawns in a random position, within 1.2m of the centre of the enemy. If there are no enemies within 10m, then it will spawn in a random location between 1 and 6m from the player's position + Y: 4m.

neuvillette.name: Q-Waterfall
neuvillette.note: There are 2 attacks. If there is a target within 10m, they will spawn with centers randomly placed in a 1.5m radius circle from target pos, with offsetX -1.5/1.5, respectively, using the target's direction. Otherwise, the two attacks will spawn on the player with offsetX -3/4 and offsetY 7.5/6, respectively.

neuvillette.name: C6
neuvillette.note: C6 projectile mechanics (collision) are not properly implemented yet.

nicole.name: Q-Projection
nicole.note: Default if projection hitbox is not otherwise specified

nilou.name: Q-LingeringAeon
nilou.note: Spawns on all enemies hit by Q-Initial.

ningguang.name: E-Skill
ningguang.note: Screen construct spawns at the same position.

ororon.name: Spirit-Orb-Hit
ororon.note: Spawns on target Spirit Orb bounced to.

raidenshogun.name: E-CoordinatedATK
raidenshogun.note: Spawns on target that E proc'd on.

razor.name: C6
razor.note: Spawns on target that C6 proc'd on.

sangonomiyakokomi.name: E-Ripple
sangonomiyakokomi.note: E has a detection area that is the same as this hitbox.

sayu.name: E-Hold-Rolling
sayu.note: Rolling mechanics (collision) are not properly implemented yet.

sayu.name: E-Hold-AdditionalElement
sayu.note: Spawns on all enemies hit by E-Hold-Rolling.

sayu.name: Q-Initial
sayu.note: Q has a detection area of 10m around the position of this hitbox.

sethos.name: Q-N1
sethos.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE. This attack is a line going from the Player to the direction of the Primary Target.

sethos.name: Q-N2-1
sethos.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE. This attack is a line going from the Player to the direction of the Primary Target.

sethos.name: Q-N2-2
sethos.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE. This attack is a line going from the Player to the direction of the Primary Target.

sethos.name: Q-N3
sethos.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE. This attack is a line going from the Player to the direction of the Primary Target.

sethos.name: ShadowpiercingShot
sethos.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE. This attack is a line going from the Player to the direction of the Primary Target.

sethos.name: ShadowpiercingShot-Head
sethos.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE. This attack is a line going from the Player to the direction of the Primary Target.

shenhe.name: Q-ElementalBurst
shenhe.note: Q/A1/C2 have a detection area with the same hitbox.

shikanoinheizou.name: Q-Iris
shikanoinheizou.note: Spawns on all enemies hit by Q-Initial.

sigewinne.name: Q-Hit
sigewinne.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE. The hitbox was taken from Neuvillette's CA and was made slightly wider.

tartaglia.name: RiptideBurst
tartaglia.note: Spawns on targets affected Riptide on death.

tartaglia.name: RiptideFlash-Range
tartaglia.note: Spawns on target affected by Riptide that was hit by FullAim.

tartaglia.name: RiptideSlash-Melee
tartaglia.note: Spawns on target affected by Riptide that was hit by a NA in E.

tartaglia.name: RiptideBlast
tartaglia.note: Spawns on all enemies affected by Riptide that were hit by Q-Melee.

tartaglia.name: RiptideFlash-C4
tartaglia.note: Spawns on all enemies affected by Riptide.

tighnari.name: E-Skill
tighnari.note: C2 has a detection area with the same hitbox.

varesa.name: E
varesa.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE.

varesa.name: Fiery-E
varesa.note: This is an approximation because we do not actually know the real AoE.

wanderer.name: C6-N1
wanderer.note: Spawns at the target hit by the N1.

xiangling.name: Q-Pyronado
xiangling.note: Pyronado mechanics (collision) are not properly implemented yet.

xiangling.name: C2
xiangling.note: Spawns on target marked for explosion.

xianyun.name: CA
xianyun.note: This is an approximation because the projectile does single target damage to every enemy it collides with on the path.

xianyun.name: E
xianyun.note: This is an approximation because we do not simulate E damage triggering on collision between character model and enemy.

yaemiko.name: CA
yaemiko.note: This is a moving hitbox. It moves at 1.65m in Y direction per attack and starts at Y: 1.65m.

yaemiko.name: E
yaemiko.note: E has a detection area of 12.5/20m (C2) around the position of this hitbox.

yanfei.name: A4
yanfei.note: Spawns on target that A4 proc'd on.

yaoyao.name: A1-Radish
yaoyao.note: Spawns on target within 8m radius of Player.

yelan.name: E-Skill
yelan.note: Spawns on all enemies marked by E

yoimiya.name: Q-AurousBlaze
yoimiya.note: Spawns on first target hit by Q-Initial.

yumemizukimizuki.name: Q-Snack-Trigger
yumemizukimizuki.note: Mizuki's pickup range is increased while the Dreamdrifter state (assumed x2.1).

zhongli.name: E-Stele
zhongli.note: Stele spawns at the same position.

zhongli.name: E-Resonance
zhongli.note: Spawns at the position of the resonating construct.
